description_long: This object consists of three pillar candles of varying heights, all with a rustic, weathered appearance, set atop a round, elevated metal pedestal. The candles are off-white with visible dark speckles and irregular surface textures, suggesting they have been partially burned or exposed to the elements. The pedestal is constructed from dark, corroded metal, featuring a circular base with rough, uneven patches and a central cylindrical support. The top platform is flat and round, providing a stable surface for the candles, and is supported by three angled metal braces. The overall look is industrial and aged, with clear signs of wear and corrosion on the metal surfaces. This object would likely serve as a decorative urban feature, perhaps in a park, plaza, or outdoor memorial.
description: A trio of rustic, off-white pillar candles with dark speckles sits atop a weathered, industrial metal pedestal with a round base and visible corrosion.
description_view_0: The main candle and a smaller one are visible on the round metal platform, with the corroded base and angled supports clearly seen.
description_view_1: All three candles are visible, showing their varying heights and the full circular top of the pedestal.
description_view_2: The tallest candle is most prominent, with the rough, corroded metal base and support column in clear view.
description_view_3: The trio of candles is fully visible, highlighting the uneven, aged surface of the pedestal and the distribution of the candles.
